title: OREGON LOW-INCOME DISCOUNT PROGRAM - 211info
text: PACIFIC POWER OREGON LOW-INCOME DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an ongoing, monthly discount on Pacific Power electric bills. Discount level varies based on income level. Discount applies in addition to any other assistance received. 825 NE Multnomah Street Suite 550 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Households at or below 60% State Median Income (SMI) Hours: Not applicable (888) 221-7070 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (888) 221-7070 Customer Service (888) 225-2611 Customer Service Español (877) 508-5088 Outages/Emergencies Main phone (888) 221-7070 Español (888) 225-2611 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to apply. Call for information. Customers who have received energy assistance will be automatically enrolled. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Discounted Electric Service Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - BACKUP ELECTRIC POWER UTILITIES - PACIFIC POWER UTILITIES - PUBLIC SAFETY POWER SHUTOFFS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PACIFIC POWER
